FQA-001.description: allTopLevelItems array now covers ALL top-level interactive items
FQA-001.evidence: HeaderMain.js lines 294–298: allTopLevelItems built with selector '.header-main-item > button.header-main-item-button, .header-main-item > a'. Plain link items have their own keydown listener (lines 480–504) for ArrowLeft/Right/Home/End. focusTopLevelItem() helper (lines 337–342) uses allTopLevelItems as the navigation set. On the full-content header (index 0), 'Student Voices' is a plain link — ArrowRight from the preceding submenu button correctly lands on it via focusTopLevelItem().

FQA-002.description: role='menubar' present on top-level ul in both PHP and TSX
FQA-002.evidence: PHP: HeaderMain.php line 150: <ul role="menubar" class="...">. TSX: HeaderMain.tsx line 126: innerBlocksProps object contains role: 'menubar' as first key, spreading onto the <ul> element. Page audit confirms ul[role='menubar'] found in all 9 header instances (menubar_ul: true across all 9 sections).

FQA-003.description: role='menuitem' present on all top-level buttons and links in both PHP and TSX
FQA-003.evidence: PHP HeaderMainItem.php line 38: <button ... role="menuitem">. PHP line 31: 'role' => 'menuitem' passed to get_template_part ThemeLink. TSX HeaderMainItem.tsx line 138: role="menuitem" on button. TSX line 120: role="menuitem" on Link component with @ts-ignore comment. Page audit confirms: menuitem_button and menuitem_link counts match expected structure per instance — e.g. index 0 (full-content, 5 submenu buttons + 1 plain link): menuitem_button=5, menuitem_link=1. Index 6 (8 plain links, no submenus): menuitem_link=8.

fix1_headerWidth.evidence: All 8 fixed-scroll-enabled instances carry md:[&.scrolling]:left-1/2, md:[&.scrolling]:-translate-x-1/2, md:[&.scrolling]:w-(--max-container). Not-fixed instance (index 4, data-fixed-scroll-desktop=0) correctly has none of these classes — only base classes present.

fix2_zIndex.evidence: md:z-200 confirmed in class list for all fixed-scroll instances (indices 0–3, 5–8) by direct inspection of page_audit section classes arrays. Not-fixed instance (index 4) correctly has no z-200 class. All submenu-bearing instances show z210_submenu: true (md:z-[210] on submenu divs): sections 0, 2, 5, 7 all confirm z210_submenu found. Note: the fixed_z200 extra_selector showed 0 matches for all sections — this is a CSS selector escaping limitation in the audit tool (the ':' in 'md:z-200' requires non-standard escaping in querySelector), not a code problem. Class presence confirmed directly from the classes arrays.

fix3_dropdownGap.evidence: HeaderMainItem.php line 55 contains md:mt-6. gap_bridge selector (before:md:h-6 class on submenu div) confirmed true on all 4 submenu-bearing instances: sections 0, 2, 5, 7.

fix4_clickOutside.evidence: HeaderMain.js lines 506–522: document click handler iterates subMenuButtons, checks clickedInsideSubmenu (sub.contains(e.target)) and clickedTrigger (btn === e.target || btn.contains(e.target)) independently before closing. Unchanged from previous QA run, confirmed still present.

fix5_keyboardNavigation.notes: All keyboard patterns now fully implemented including the FQA-001 fix for plain link items.

patterns.Home_End_on_trigger_moves_to_first_last: PASS — lines 441–447, uses allTopLevelItems[0] and allTopLevelItems[length-1]
patterns.ArrowLeft_Right_Home_End_on_plain_link_i: PASS — lines 480–503, new listener for non-submenu items

build.notes: Build compiles cleanly. 0 lint errors in Header block files (HeaderMain.tsx, HeaderMainItem.tsx, HeaderMain.js). All lint errors are in unrelated blocks (MainWrapper, FullWidthMedia, TestimonialCPT, TestimonialsCarousel). These were pre-existing and are out of scope for this QA run.

registration.notes: taktician_validate_all registration check passed. All child blocks valid.

tsxPhpSync.notes: taktician_validate_all sync check passed all sub-checks: phpExtractPattern, phpDocblock, htmlStructureSync, attributeUsage, contextConsistency, classNameInsideBlockProps, redundantNullCoalescing, phpFunctionExistence.

attributes.notes: No attribute changes in this revision cycle. Previously verified passing.

edgeCases.notes: Regression confirmed: not-fixed instance (index 4) has no z-index or positioning classes. Plain-links-only instance (index 6, 8 items) renders with menubar_ul and menuitem_link=8. Single-item instance (index 8) renders correctly.

testsRun.test: ArrowRight on plain link menuitem moves focus to next top-level item
testsRun.notes: Interactive screenshot test: focused first a[role='menuitem'] in instance 0, pressed ArrowRight, verified focus moved to the next focusable element via the new allTopLevelItems keydown handler on plain link items.
ul[role='menubar'] confirmed in all 9 header instances via page_audit extraSelectors.

testsRun.test: role='menuitem' on all top-level interactive elements
testsRun.notes: button[role='menuitem'] and a[role='menuitem'] counts match expected structure across all 9 instances.

patternCompliance.notes: All WAI-ARIA Navigation Menubar pattern requirements now satisfied. role='menubar' on ul, role='menuitem' on all top-level items, full keyboard traversal covering both submenu-button items and plain link items via allTopLevelItems, correct ArrowDown/Up/Left/Right/Home/End/Escape/Tab behaviour throughout.

markupDuplication.notes: Unchanged from previous run. Dual search forms remain intentional.

tsxPhpSync2.notes: role='menubar' and role='menuitem' additions are consistently applied in both PHP and TSX. No structural divergence introduced.

innerBlocks.notes: 9 header instances confirmed, all inside demo containers. Block structure unchanged.

specCompliance.notes: All 5 original focus areas pass. All 3 FQA issues resolved. No unresolved issues remain.

FQA-003 RESOLVED: role='menuitem' on top-level buttons (PHP:38, TSX:138) and plain links (PHP via ThemeLink 'role' param:31, TSX:120); counts match expected structure across all instances
